roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION TRANSFER TO SACRAMENTO CO SENT
FELONY PLEA TRANSCRIPT FILED
/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT TO COUNTY OF RESIDENCE/DAWT/MOGRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:PHC & POSSIBLE DISPO ON APD MTR/DAWT/X:PER BAILIFF, DEFENDANT IS MEDICALLY UNABLE TO BE TRANSPORTED,/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL REPRESENTS TO THE COURTTHAT HE HAS GONE OVER AND BEEN GIVEN PERMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT TO PROCEEDWITH THE FOLLOWING PROPOSED DISPOSITION IN HIS ABSENCE,/VD:HEARING DATE OF 01-21-22/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:11-22-21/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:7 MONTHS/ADDL CTS:84/4019HALF/X:HARVEY WAIVER VICTIM RESTITUTION FROM 21010468,/PROB EXT:12-14-22/

/CAL: TS APD MTR AND JOIN 21010468/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH (A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANTSHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSIS IN PLACE,/CTORD: CURFEW FROM APM TO 6 AM/DOP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:CLARIFICATION ON CREDITS & NOTIFICATION OF PROBATION EXPIRATION DATE//X:DEFENDANT PROPERLY NOTICED OF PROBATION EXPIRATION DATE OF 09-28-23/CTORD:SENTENCE UPDATED TO REFLECT 120 DAYS COUNTY JAIL WITH 22 DAYS CREDITFOR TIME SERVED/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY SERVE REMAINDER OF SENTENCE ON HOME DETENTION,/

/CAL: TO SET APD MTR, TRAILING 20012008/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA: 04-07-21/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 120D/ADDL CTS: 21/CTORD: REMAINDEROF TIME TO BE SERVED IN HOME DETENTION/PROB EXT: 09-28-23/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSD/CTORD: HOME DETENTION/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: STAY AWAY ORDER TERMINATIONS AND NEW ONES SUBMITTED/DOP/
